project.title: Les di mi médula. Me echaron de la casa. - Parte 8 (final)
project.subtitle: La firma
project.hook: Tres minutos. Nadie en esa mesa sabía que yo estaba ahí.

Single crisp white laboratory report sheet half out of a torn cream envelope, faint printed table lines, a red seal in the corner, no readable text, neutral dark background, high detail, realistic photography, no logo.

Single small yellowed carbon-copy receipt from twenty-six years ago, brittle creased paper, faint printed ruled boxes, a smudged red thumb-seal and two handwritten ink signature lines at the bottom, no readable text, neutral dark background, extreme detail, realistic photography, no logo.
